title: Four Seasons at The Nile Plaza
reviewText:
The staff in all departments are exceptional, friendly, sincere, and authentic! There are nice shops in case you missed bringing home that special Egyptian memory.

Also, the hotel has a combination Banking ATM and Foreign Cash Exchange Machine at your disposal. That way you can easily exchange your home currency for local Egyptian Pounds for added convenience for all  your travels in Egypt

The concierge staff was very efficient, and our tour guide, Hana, was very knowledgeable and passionate about Egyptian history. We learned a lot from her in the museums and tours!

Also, we had one of the best drivers for all our time in Cairo, Mr. Said Etman. Mr. Etman was a gem and so glad he took care of our safe city traveling needs, and has deep knowledge of the local areas too! 

We were delighted with our experiences at the Four Seasons.

title: Acceptable
reviewText:
Positive: I am used to this hotel and have been a regular client as guest and visitor to the facilities either the restaurants or the spa
It is still maybe the best in cairo in terms of decency and cleanliness | Negative: It has deteriorated on all levels be it hygiene or services and curtsy .
As a regular and loyal customer, i did not feel that the hotel management cares. They are more concerned with the idea of filling rooms even while lower its standards and decency. The place is a bit run down after the summer crowds but it is not an excuse specially that it is not any hotel this is the fourseasons . I have experienced the fourseasons in many other cities such as Amman, Beirut, Geneva, Athens and stayed for years at four seasons Damascus before the crisis and after; i cant but say that i am disappointed in the cairo nile plaza after my last visit
